        result = run_command(

    @pytest.mark.error
    def test_foreign_key_violation_existing_data(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path):
        """Error: Adding FK with invalid existing data should fail."""
        migration_file = tmp_path / "migration.json"
        db_file = tmp_path / "app.db"
    
        with sqlite3.connect(db_file) as conn:
            conn.execute("CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY)")
            conn.execute(
                "CREATE TABLE posts (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER)"
            )
            conn.execute(
                "INSERT INTO posts (id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)", (1, 999)
            )
            conn.commit()
    
        migration = {
            "version": 1,
            "description": "Add FK with invalid data",
            "operations": [
                {
                    "type": "add_foreign_key",
                    "table": "posts",
                    "name": "fk_posts_user_id",
                    "columns": ["user_id"],
                    "references": {"table": "users", "columns": ["id"]},
                }
            ],
        }
    
        migration_file.write_text(json.dumps(migration))
    
        result = run_command(
            entrypoint_argv, "migrate", str(migration_file), str(db_file)
        )

    @pytest.mark.error
    def test_transactional_rollback_on_failure(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path):
        """Error: Failed op should roll back prior operations."""
        migration_file = tmp_path / "migration.json"
        db_file = tmp_path / "app.db"
    
        with sqlite3.connect(db_file) as conn:
            conn.execute(
                "CREATE TABLE posts (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER)"
            )
            conn.commit()
    
        migration = {
            "version": 1,
            "description": "Create index then fail",
            "operations": [
                {
                    "type": "create_index",
                    "name": "idx_posts_user_id",
                    "table": "posts",
                    "columns": ["user_id"],
                    "unique": False,
                },
                {
                    "type": "add_foreign_key",
                    "table": "posts",
                    "name": "fk_posts_user_id",
                    "columns": ["user_id"],
                    "references": {"table": "users", "columns": ["id"]},
                },
            ],
        }
    
        migration_file.write_text(json.dumps(migration))
    
        result = run_command(
            entrypoint_argv, "migrate", str(migration_file), str(db_file)
        )
    
        assert result.returncode == 1, "Expected command to fail with exit code 1"
    
        with sqlite3.connect(db_file) as conn:
            indexes = conn.execute("PRAGMA index_list(posts)").fetchall()
            try:
                applied = conn.execute(
                    "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _migrations WHERE version = 1"
                ).fetchone()[0]
            except sqlite3.OperationalError:
                applied = 0

    @pytest.mark.error
    def test_rollback_transactional_on_failure(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path):
        """Error: Failed rollback should not partially apply changes."""
        migration_file = tmp_path / "migration.json"
        db_file = tmp_path / "app.db"
    
        migration = {
            "version": 1,
            "description": "Create parents with index",
            "operations": [
                {
                    "type": "create_table",
                    "table": "parents",
                    "columns": [
                        {"name": "id", "type": "INTEGER", "primary_key": True},
                    ],
                },
                {
                    "type": "create_index",
                    "name": "idx_parents_id",
                    "table": "parents",
                    "columns": ["id"],
                    "unique": False,
                },
            ],
        }
    
        migration_file.write_text(json.dumps(migration))
    
        result = run_command(entrypoint_argv, "migrate", str(migration_file), str(db_file))
        assert result.returncode == 0, f"Setup failed: {result.stderr}"

            conn.execute(

                "FOREIGN KEY(parent_id) REFERENCES parents(id))"
            )
            conn.execute("INSERT INTO parents (id) VALUES (?)", (1,))
            conn.execute(
                "INSERT INTO children (id, parent_id) VALUES (?, ?)", (1, 1)
            )
            conn.commit()
    
        result = run_command(entrypoint_argv, "rollback", str(db_file))

entrypoint_argv = ['uv', 'run', 'migration_tool.py']
tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_migrate_skips_already_app0')

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_migrate_skips_already_applied_dependencies(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path):
        """Functionality: Single-target migrate skips already-applied ancestors."""
        db_file = tmp_path / "app.db"
        migrations_dir = tmp_path / "migrations"
        migrations_dir.mkdir()
    
        migration_v1 = {
            "version": 1,
            "description": "Create users table",
            "operations": [
                {
                    "type": "create_table",
                    "table": "users",
                    "columns": [
                        {"name": "id", "type": "INTEGER", "primary_key": True}
                    ],
                }
            ],
        }
        migration_v2 = {
            "version": 2,
            "description": "Add age column",
            "depends_on": [1],
            "operations": [
                {
                    "type": "add_column",
                    "table": "users",
                    "column": {"name": "age", "type": "INTEGER"},
                }
            ],
        }
        migration_v3 = {
            "version": 3,
            "description": "Add name column",
            "depends_on": [2],
            "operations": [
                {
                    "type": "add_column",
                    "table": "users",
                    "column": {"name": "name", "type": "TEXT"},
                }
            ],
        }
    
        (migrations_dir / "migration_v1.json").write_text(json.dumps(migration_v1))
        (migrations_dir / "migration_v2.json").write_text(json.dumps(migration_v2))
        (migrations_dir / "migration_v3.json").write_text(json.dumps(migration_v3))
    
        migration_v1_file = tmp_path / "migration_v1.json"
        migration_v1_file.write_text(json.dumps(migration_v1))
        migration_v3_file = tmp_path / "migration_v3.json"
        migration_v3_file.write_text(json.dumps(migration_v3))
    
        result = run_command(
            entrypoint_argv, "migrate", str(migration_v1_file), str(db_file)
        )
        assert result.returncode == 0, f"Setup failed: {result.stderr}"
    
        result = run_command(
            entrypoint_argv,
            "migrate",
            str(migration_v3_file),
            str(db_file),
            "--migrations-dir",
            str(migrations_dir) + "/",
        )
